name: Clearity CR Solutions, LLC.
description_short: Memphis-based credit repair firm specializing in dispute resolution, credit score improvement, and small business credit optimization. Founded by Crystal Lomax.
description_long:
Clearity CR Solutions LLC is a financial solutions provider based in Memphis, Tennessee, founded by Crystal Lomax, a financial advocate with personal experience overcoming credit challenges. The company was established with a mission to empower individuals and small business owners to regain control of their financial health through credit repair and financial education services delivered in a judgment-free environment.

The company offers comprehensive personal credit repair services designed to address negative items on credit reports, boost credit scores, reduce credit utilization, and help clients recover from financial setbacks including bankruptcy. Their services extend to small business credit optimization and loan readiness coaching, helping clients qualify for personal loans, mortgages, auto financing, and business loans with improved terms. Clearity CR Solutions provides personalized credit repair plans and financial literacy tools aimed at establishing healthy financial habits alongside dispute resolution work.

Clearity CR Solutions differentiates itself through founder Crystal Lomax's emphasis on empathy-driven service and a supportive approach to credit challenges. The company markets itself as delivering compassionate, judgment-free guidance while maintaining focus on high-quality results. Their approach combines traditional credit dispute work with broader financial education and business loan preparation services, positioning themselves as more than transactional credit repair.

While the website demonstrates professional positioning and legitimate service offerings, prospective clients should note that specific pricing, success rates, and detailed dispute methodologies are not disclosed on their public-facing website. Timeline claims of three to six months for significant progress are general estimates without individual case breakdowns. As with all credit repair services, results depend heavily on individual credit report contents and the validity of disputes filed.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Founder Crystal Lomax has personal financial recovery experience, bringing authentic empathy to client relationships
Offers both personal and business credit repair, addressing gaps for entrepreneurs and self-employed individuals
Addresses bankruptcy entries specifically, helping clients rebuild after major financial setbacks
Provides financial education and literacy components alongside dispute services, not just transactional fixes
Free consultation available to assess individual situations before commitment
Judgment-free environment emphasis may appeal to clients with shame or anxiety around credit issues
Local Memphis presence with physical address and dedicated phone line for direct contact
cons: Website does not disclose pricing, service fees, or payment structures for any offerings
No specific success rates, case studies, or documented outcomes provided to evaluate effectiveness
Vague timeline estimates (3-6 months) without individual assessment or documentation of typical results
Limited detail on dispute methodology, dispute validation process, or how they address creditor responses
Business loan assistance description unclear—company does not appear to directly originate loans, only optimize credit for applications
best_for: Memphis-area residents seeking local credit repair with founder engagement and personal relationship building
Small business owners needing both personal and business credit optimization before loan applications
Individuals recovering from bankruptcy or major financial setbacks who value empathetic, non-judgmental guidance
Clients seeking integrated financial education alongside traditional credit dispute services
diagnosis: Clearity CR Solutions is best suited for credit repair clients in or near Memphis who value founder engagement and integrated financial education, or small business owners needing credit optimization before loan applications. Primary caveat: the website lacks pricing transparency, documented success rates, and detailed dispute methodology, requiring direct consultation to evaluate service quality and expected outcomes.
services: Personal credit repair and dispute resolution
Bankruptcy recovery and negative item removal
Loan readiness coaching and application preparation
Interest rate and loan term optimization guidance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
